name: ctyun-accessone
description: OctoBus package for 天翼云 AccessOne 边缘安全加速平台 — 8只读查询 + 2写 (新增访问控制规则 / 域名级开关启停) via CTAPI EOP signing. 覆盖6个产品域.

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryDom.name: query-domain-list
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryDom.description: 查询域名列表及基础信息。支持按产品类型/状态/加速范围过滤。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QuerySer.name: query-service-detail
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QuerySer.description: 查询账号下开通的 AccessOne 服务基本信息。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryDom.name: query-domain-rule-act
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryDom.description: 查询指定域名的防护规则引擎总开关状态。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryDom.name: query-domain-rule-config
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryDom.description: 查询指定域名的防护规则引擎配置详情。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryWaf.name: query-waf-config
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryWaf.description: 查询指定域名的 Web 应用防火墙基础配置。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryAcc.name: query-access-control-switch
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryAcc.description: 查询指定域名的访问控制/限流总开关状态。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/InsertAc.name: insert-access-control
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/InsertAc.description: [写] 新增域名访问控制/限流规则。支持批量 (domains≤50, configs≤20)。需 AKSK 具备 scdn/domain 权限。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/UpdateAc.name: update-access-control-switch
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/UpdateAc.description: [写] 开启或关闭域名级访问控制总开关 (mod=ON 开启, mod=CLOSE 关闭)。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryRes.name: query-resource-packages
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryRes.description: 查询安全与加速资源包列表。

Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryIPv.name: query-ipv6-nosup-link
Ctyun_AccessOne.Ctyun_AccessOne/QueryIPv.description: 查询指定 IPv6 检测任务中不支持的链接详情。需要提供检测任务 ID。
